title: Single Nuclei Transcriptome of a Hypoplastic Left Heart Syndrome Patient Post Myocardial Infarction
author: Turaga, Diwakar
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Single-nucleus RNA sequencing (snRNA-seq) was performed on right ventricular (RV) myocardial tissue obtained at transplantation from a patient with HLHS complicated by myocardial infarction (HLHS-MI). After quality control and doublet removal, 4,134 nuclei were retained. Cell types were identified by graph-based clustering and canonical marker expression.
steps_raw: Single-nucleus RNA sequencing (snRNA-seq) was performed on right ventricular (RV) myocardial tissue obtained at transplantation from a patient with HLHS complicated by myocardial infarction (HLHS-MI). After quality control and doublet removal, 4,134 nuclei were retained. Cell types were identified by graph-based clustering and canonical marker expression.
